Keyboard Shortcuts

Navigation

Tab Navigate forward
Shift + Tab Navigate backward
Arrow Keys Spatial navigation
Home Go to top of page
End Go to bottom of page

Actions

Enter Activate element
Space Toggle/Select
Escape Close modal/menu
Ctrl + / Show this help

Accessibility

Alt + A Open accessibility options
Alt + H Go to main heading
Alt + M Go to main content
Alt + N Go to navigation

Expert Solutions

Professional Digital Services

Comprehensive technology solutions designed to accelerate your business growth and digital transformation. Notable Opportunities Shape Your Tomorrow - we're actively developing content on our YouTube channel (@TycenYT) and live streaming on Kick.com/Tycen while building our service portfolio.

Technology Solutions That Drive Results

We specialize in modern web development, AI-powered solutions, and content creation strategies that help businesses establish a strong digital presence. Our approach combines technical expertise with creative innovation to deliver measurable results.

Our Development Philosophy

We believe in creating digital experiences that not only look great but perform exceptionally. Our development process emphasizes clean code, responsive design, and user-centered functionality. Every project is built with scalability, performance, and maintainability in mind, ensuring your investment continues to deliver value as your business grows.

Development Tools

Development tools and resources to help streamline your coding workflow and improve productivity.

Learn More

Vibe Coding

Custom web development with a focus on aesthetics, user experience, and unique visual identity.

Learn More

Web Development

Web development services with a focus on modern frameworks like React and Astro.

Learn More

Mobile Development

Basic mobile application development with React Native for simple use cases.

Learn More

3D Printing Services

Small-scale 3D printing services for simple models and prototypes using Creality and Elegoo printers.

Learn More

Content Creation

Basic content creation guidance for YouTube and Kick.com with a focus on tech and gaming content.

Learn More

Development Tools

We offer resources and guidance on development tools that can help improve your coding workflow. Based on our experience with tools like Cursor AI, VS Code extensions, and other productivity enhancers, we can provide recommendations tailored to your specific needs. Note that our services in this area are currently limited to consultation and guidance rather than full implementation.

Key Features

  • Development environment recommendations
  • VS Code extension suggestions
  • AI coding tool guidance (Cursor AI, GitHub Copilot)
  • Basic workflow optimization tips
  • Code quality tool recommendations
  • Resource sharing and tutorials
  • Limited consultation services (subject to availability)

AI Development Tools

Cursor AI

A revolutionary code editor built on VSCode that integrates Claude and GPT-4 language models to provide intelligent coding assistance with full codebase context understanding.

Learn more

GitHub Copilot

An AI pair programmer that offers suggestions for whole lines or entire functions right inside your editor, powered by OpenAI Codex.

Learn more

Docker

A platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in containers, ensuring consistency across development and production environments.

Learn more

Jest

A comprehensive JavaScript testing framework with a focus on simplicity, supporting projects using Babel, TypeScript, Node.js, React, and more with intelligent test generation capabilities.

Learn more

Success Stories

Development Workflow Optimization

Client: Local Tech Startup

25% reduction in development time and 40% improvement in code quality metrics

Developer Productivity Enhancement

Client: Small Software Team

40% increase in developer productivity and 30% reduction in bugs by implementing modern development tools and practices

Discuss Your Project

Vibe Coding

Our upcoming 'Vibe Coding' services will focus on creating visually stunning and unique web experiences that capture your brand's essence and personality. We combine modern frameworks like React and Astro with creative design principles to build websites that stand out from the crowd. This service is currently in development and will be launching soon.

Key Features

  • Unique visual identity and aesthetic design
  • Custom animations and interactive elements
  • Immersive user experiences
  • Modern frameworks (React, Astro, Three.js)
  • Responsive design with visual flair
  • Brand personality integration
  • Portfolio showcasing and consultation available

Success Stories

NosytLabs Website

Client: Internal Project

Our own website showcases our Vibe Coding approach with unique aesthetics, animations, and interactive elements

Discuss Your Project

Web Development

We offer web development services with a focus on modern frameworks like React, Vue, and Astro. Our availability is limited as we primarily work on select projects that align with our expertise. We prioritize responsive design, performance optimization, and SEO best practices in all our web development work.

Key Features

  • Responsive design for all devices
  • Front-end development (React, Astro, Vue)
  • Basic back-end development (Node.js)
  • Simple content management systems
  • Performance optimization
  • SEO best practices implementation
  • Limited availability (select projects only)

Success Stories

Portfolio Website Redesign

Client: Freelance Developer

Created a responsive portfolio website using Astro and TailwindCSS, improving page load times and mobile experience

Discuss Your Project

Mobile Development

We offer limited mobile development services primarily using React Native for cross-platform applications. Our focus is on simple, functional applications rather than complex enterprise solutions. Please note that our mobile development services are currently in beta and have limited availability.

Key Features

  • Cross-platform development with React Native
  • Basic UI/UX design for mobile
  • Simple app functionality implementation
  • Testing on limited device configurations
  • Guidance for App Store and Google Play submission
  • Basic push notification setup
  • Limited availability (beta service)

Success Stories

Simple Task Management App

Client: Independent Contractor

Developed a basic task management app with React Native for personal productivity tracking

Discuss Your Project

3D Printing Services

We offer small-scale 3D printing services for simple models and prototypes using our Creality and Elegoo printers. Our service is best suited for hobbyists, small projects, and educational purposes. Please note that our capacity is limited, and we primarily focus on FDM printing with PLA and PETG materials, with some resin printing capabilities for smaller detailed objects.

Key Features

  • FDM printing with Creality Ender printers
  • Resin printing with Elegoo Mars (limited capacity)
  • Basic materials: PLA and PETG for FDM, standard resins
  • Simple post-processing (support removal)
  • STL file preparation assistance
  • Local pickup or basic shipping options
  • Limited capacity (small batch projects only)

Success Stories

Tabletop Gaming Miniatures

Client: Local Gaming Group

Created a set of custom gaming miniatures and terrain pieces for a local D&D group using resin printing

Replacement Parts for Home Appliances

Client: Residential Customer

Printed replacement knobs and brackets for household appliances, saving the cost of full replacements

Educational Models

Client: High School Teacher

Produced anatomical models for a biology class to enhance hands-on learning experiences

Discuss Your Project

Content Creation

Based on our experience creating content for YouTube (formerly TycenYT) and Kick.com, we offer basic guidance and tips for content creators. Our focus is on tech reviews, gaming content, and tutorials. Please note that we offer limited consultation services rather than full production services, and our availability depends on our own content creation schedule.

Key Features

  • Basic YouTube channel setup guidance
  • Kick.com streaming setup recommendations
  • Simple content strategy suggestions
  • Thumbnail design tips and feedback
  • Video editing software recommendations
  • Equipment recommendations for beginners
  • Basic SEO and discoverability tips
  • Limited consultation availability

Success Stories

YouTube Setup Guidance

Client: Tech Enthusiast

Helped a tech enthusiast set up their first YouTube channel with proper equipment and basic SEO practices

Kick.com Stream Setup

Client: Gaming Hobbyist

Provided guidance on basic stream setup, OBS configuration, and engagement strategies for a new Kick.com streamer

Discuss Your Project
